# Vibe Coding Starter Pack — LLM Entry

## Quick Start
1. Clone repo, npm install, cp .env.example .env.local
2. Read AGENTS.md for full project conventions
3. Read .clinerules/ for AI coding standards
4. Check memory-bank/ for current project state

## Architecture
- Next.js 16 App Router with React 19
- TypeScript strict mode
- Vitest for testing (80% coverage target)
- Husky + lint-staged for pre-commit hooks
- GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Key Files
- AGENTS.md — Agent conventions
- ROADMAP.md — Quality standards
- .clinerules/ — AI rules
- memory-bank/ — Project memory
- vitest.config.ts — Test configuration
- sentinel.ts — Self-healing test watcher
